process = Process("Data Pipeline Workflow")

start = StartEvent(id="Start")
process.add(start)

collect = Task(id="CollectData", name="collect data", task_type="service")
process.add(collect)

transform = Task(id="TransformData", name="transform data", task_type="user")
process.add(transform)

validate = Task(id="ValidateData", name="validate data", task_type="user")
process.add(validate)

store = Task(id="StoreData", name="store data", task_type="service")
process.add(store)

end = EndEvent(id="End")
process.add(end)

flow1 = SequenceFlow(source=start, target=collect)
process.add(flow1)

flow2 = SequenceFlow(source=collect, target=transform)
process.add(flow2)

flow3 = SequenceFlow(source=transform, target=validate)
process.add(flow3)

flow4 = SequenceFlow(source=validate, target=store)
process.add(flow4)

flow5 = SequenceFlow(source=store, target=end)
process.add(flow5)
```
